title: blink eye
description: Added a blinking effect for players to make the game more realistic
body:
![Eye Fatigue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/199da9e5d19a5c8c5ea618c49be99c9335fdaf0d.gif)![Close your eyes to prevent Endermen from being provoked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e4a4b1179be65e4a4762fa675b3c46da4d982ee.gif)A blinking effect has been added for players to make the game more realistic, and it also avoids eye contact with Endermen. Default key: R.
The eye system features both manual blinking control and involuntary eye fatigue (automatic blinking).
This mod includes a highly customizable configuration file: blink-config.json.
Here are a few recommended configuration tweaks to boost realism:
"maxEyesOpenTime": 5000,
"fatigueStartTime": 10000,
If you have any questions, please contact us via **xgfgd@foxmail.com**.
